<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="sHTEnFHJ7uCiZEDVIF5X"> <mxGraphModel dx="3927" dy="1484" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" background="none" math="1" shadow="1"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-1" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><b>Real Dataset</b></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><b>WSD4FESDRM</b><br>---------</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">34 subjects</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Dynamic shoulder rotation to Borg RPE 20 exhaustion</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">30–60% MVIC<br>---------</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Zenodo 8415066</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Sci. Data 2024</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="150" x="10" y="-40" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-2" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><b>Demonstration Buffer</b><br><br>---------<br><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$\tau = \{(o_i, a_i)\}_{t=1}^{T}$$</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Per-agent rollouts&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Demonstration Collector (real data)</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="170" width="150" x="1168" y="-35" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-3" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><b>3CC-r CALIBRATION</b></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Path G: real_data_calibration.py</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">---------</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Forward-simulate ODE per subject&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Grid-search (F, R) to minimise&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$|ET_{obs} - ET_{pred}|$$</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">---------</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Muscle Parameters&nbsp;</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font style="font-size: 9px;">Shoulder: F=0.0146, R=5.8×10^{-4}, r=15&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font style="font-size: 9px;">Ankle: F=0.00589, R=0.0182, r=15&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font style="font-size: 9px;">Knee: F=0.0150, R=0.00175, r=15&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font style="font-size: 9px;">Elbow: F=0.00912, R=9.4×10^{-4}, r=15&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font style="font-size: 9px;">Trunk: F=0.00567, R=0.00354, r=15&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div style="text-align: left;"><font style="font-size: 9px;">Grip: F=0.00794, R=0.00109, r=30&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div><span style="font-size: 9px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><br>⇒ (F, R, r) per muscle [Frey-Law 2012]</span></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="380" width="145" x="12.5" y="205" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-4" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><b>MMICRL</b></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><b><br></b></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><b>Multi-Modal Inv. Constrained RL</b></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">---------</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Obj:</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$\lambda_1 H[\pi(\tau)] - \lambda_2 H[\pi(\tau|z)]$$</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$= \lambda_2 I(\tau; z) + (\lambda_1 - \lambda_2) H[\pi(\tau)]$$</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Recommendation:</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$\lambda_1 = \lambda_2 \Rightarrow \text{pure MI}$$</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">---------</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">CFDE normalising flows (MADE/MAF)&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">conditioned on type z&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">E-step:&nbsp;</font><span style="font-size: 9px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">$$\arg\max_z \; p(z|\tau)$$</span></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">M-step:&nbsp;&nbsp;</font><span style="font-size: 9px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">$$\max \sum \log p(x|z)$$</span></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">ConstraintNet (BCE) --&gt;&nbsp;</font><span style="font-size: 9px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">$$\Theta_{\max}(z)$$</span></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">---------</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$\Theta_{\max}(z)$$&nbsp;&nbsp;</font><span style="font-size: 9px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">⇒ per muscle per type z&nbsp;&nbsp;</span></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">[shoulder=0.70, knee=0.60, grip=0.35...]</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="515" width="160" x="1163" y="243" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-5" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><b>STATE OBSERVATION</b></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$x_i(t) = [MR, MA, MF]$$</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">MR + MA + MF = 1&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Local obs: o_i ∈ ℝ^{19}&nbsp;&nbsp;</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Global state: s ∈ ℝ^{114}</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="120" x="12.5" y="810" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-7" edge="1" parent="1" height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="510" y="885" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="270" y="880" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-11" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><b>3CC-r ODE INTEGRATION</b></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$\frac{dMA}{dt} = C_{safe} - F \cdot MA$$</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$\frac{dMF}{dt} = F \cdot MA - R_{eff} \cdot MF$$&nbsp;</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$\frac{dMR}{dt} = R_{eff} \cdot MF - C_{safe}$$</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$R_{eff} = R \cdot r \; (\text{rest/reperfusion}) \;\cdot\; R_{eff} = R \; (\text{load})$$</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Euler step · dt=1 min · Δt* governs min rest duration</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$\Theta_{max} = \frac{R}{F+R} \;\cdot\; C_{max} = \frac{FR}{F+R}$$</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="310" width="230" x="510" y="810" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-47" parent="1" style="text;html=1;whiteSpace=wrap;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;rounded=0;" value="<b>2. raw rollouts</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="100" x="580" y="5" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-6" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><b>ECBF SAFETY FILTER</b></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">CBF-QP: $$\min_C ||C - C_{nom}||^2$$ s.t.:</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">(i) Fatigue ceiling&nbsp; $$h(x)=\Theta_{max}-MF \ge 0$$:</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$-F C + F^2 MA + R_{eff} FMA - R_{eff}^2 MF + \alpha_1 h + \alpha_2 \psi_1 \ge 0$$</font></div><div><span style="font-size: 9px; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">(ii) Resting floor&nbsp; $$h_2(x)=MR \ge 0$$</span></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$C \le R_{eff} MF + \alpha_3 (1-MA-MF), \;\; C \ge 0$$</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">$$\alpha_1=\alpha_2=\alpha_3=0.5$$ · $$\Theta_{max}$$ from MMICRL (personalised per worker)</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Assumption: $$\Theta_{max} \ge \Theta_{min}$$ , $$\Theta_{max}=F/(F+Rr)$$ per muscle</font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;"><br></font></div><div><font style="font-size: 9px;">Hard guarantee: $$MF(t) \le \Theta_{max} \;\forall t$$</font></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="540" width="281.25" x="1102.38" y="814" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-65" edge="1" parent="1" source="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-6" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.02;exitY=0.148;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;exitPerimeter=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.25;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-107" edge="1" parent="1" source="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-66" <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-66" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div><b>REWARD &amp; SAFETY COST</b></div><div><br></div><div>$$R_t = \sum_i \ln(U_i \cdot x_i(i)) - D_i(MF_i)$$</div><div><br></div><div>RL return = Nash surplus product&nbsp; (by construction)</div><div><br></div><div>$$C_t = \sum_{i,g} \max(0, MF_{i,g} - \Theta_{max,i,g})$$</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="240" x="390" y="1400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-68" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;align=center;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div style=""><span style="color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));"><b>9-METRIC EPISODE LOGGER</b></span></div><div style=""><br></div>O1: violation_rate,&nbsp;O2: safety_rate,&nbsp;O3: jain_fairness,&nbsp;O4: tasks_completed,&nbsp;O5: cumulative_reward, O6: peak_fatigue, O7: forced_rest_rate, O8: constraint_recovery_time, O9: cumulative_cost" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="260" x="720" y="1400" as="geometry" /> source="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-11" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-68" value=""> <mxGeometry height="50" relative="1" width="50" as="geometry"> <mxPoint x="560" y="1110" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="610" y="1060" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-72" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div><b>COST CRITIC&nbsp; $$V_c(s)$$&nbsp; +&nbsp; LAGRANGIAN $$\lambda$$</b></div><div><br></div><div>$$V_c: 2 \times 128 \; \text{Tanh} \rightarrow \text{cost-to-go}$$ · $$L_{ccrit} = \text{MSE}(V_c, \text{cost returns})$$</div><div><br></div><div>$$\log \lambda \in \text{nn.Parameter}$$ · Adam</div><div><br></div><div>$$\Delta \log \lambda \propto -\lambda \cdot (\text{cost}_{mean} - \text{budget})$$ · budget=0.10</div><div><br></div><div>$$\uparrow \lambda \; \text{if} \; MF &gt; \Theta_{max}$$ · $$\downarrow \lambda \; \text{when constraint satisfied}$$</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="460" width="250" x="1118.01" y="1400" as="geometry" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div><b>CENTRALISED VALUE CRITIC&nbsp; V_φ(s)</b></div><div><br></div><div>s ∈ ℝ^55 → scalar V(s)&nbsp; ·&nbsp; 2×128 Tanh&nbsp; ·&nbsp; lr=1e-3</div><div><br></div><div>L_critic = MSE(V(s), GAE returns)&nbsp; ·&nbsp; γ=0.99&nbsp; ·&nbsp; λ_GAE=0.95</div><div><br></div><div>GAE: δ_t = R_t + γV(s_{t+1}) − V(s_t)&nbsp; ·&nbsp; Â_t = Σ(γλ)^k δ_{t+k}</div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="120" width="350" x="-70" y="1400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-75" edge="1" parent="1" source="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-5" style="endArrow=classic;html=1;rounded=0;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.407;entryY=-0.02;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;entryPerimeter=0;" </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-76" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div><b>MAPPO-LAGRANGIAN POLICY UPDATE</b></div><div><br></div><div>L_actor = −min(rÂ, clip(r,1±ε)Â) + λ·max(ĉ_r1, ĉ_r2) − β·H</div><div><br></div><div>r = πθ(a|o) / πθ_old(a|o)&nbsp; &nbsp;·&nbsp; &nbsp;ε = 0.2&nbsp; &nbsp;·&nbsp; &nbsp;β = 0.01&nbsp; &nbsp;·&nbsp; &nbsp;grad-clip=0.5</div><div><br></div><div>max(cost surrogates): errs toward safety under ratio truncation</div><div><br></div><div>batch=256&nbsp; &nbsp;·&nbsp; &nbsp;epochs=10&nbsp; &nbsp;·&nbsp; &nbsp;lr=3e−4&nbsp; &nbsp;·&nbsp; &nbsp;5M total steps&nbsp; &nbsp;·&nbsp; &nbsp;5 seeds</div><div><br></div><div>→ actor weights updated (closes Loop id="QJJUaGApkBwfEwwX3C37-80" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=default;" value="<div><b>Decentralised Actor (NEURAL DRIVE)</b></div><div><br></div><div>Baseline: C_nom(t) = k_p (T_L(t) − MA(t))&nbsp; &nbsp;·&nbsp; &nbsp;k_p = 1.0</div><div><br></div><div>Training: C_nom = f_θ(C, x, task)&nbsp; RL policy replaces baseline</div><div><br></div><div>Decentralised GAE: δ_t = R_t + γV(s_{t+1}) − V(s_t) · Â_t = Σ(γλ)^k δ_{t+k}

r = πθ(a|o) / πθ_old(a|o) · ε = 0.2 · β = 0.01 · grad-clip=0.5
max(cost surrogates): errs toward safety under ratio truncation
batch=256 · epochs=10 · lr=3e−4 · 5M total steps · 5 seeds
→ actor weights updated (closes Loop 2)

div.div: Baseline: C_nom(t) = k_p (T_L(t) − MA(t)) · k_p = 1.0
Training: C_nom = f_θ(C, x, task) RL policy replaces baseline
Decentralised actor: 2×64 Tanh → output · Input o_i ∈ ℝ^19 (local obs only)

div.div: max_{a_{ij}} Σ_{i=1}^N ln( U(i, j*(i)) − D_i(MF_i) ) [Nash SWF]
D_i(MF) = κ · MF^2 / (1 − MF) [Eq.32] · κ = 1.0 · diverges as MF → 1
Rest option U(i,0) = D_i + ε [Eq.31] · Valid iff S_ij = U(i,j) − D_i > 0
Tasks: heavy_lift · light_sort · carry · overhead_reach · push_cart · rest

Discrete task j* → per-muscle demand vector (6 tasks × 6 muscles lookup table)
e.g. heavy_lift: shoulder=0.45, knee=0.40, trunk=0.50, grip=0.55
